behavior_in_task_description.reason: Tests rely on the specific internal function name `escapeShellArg` and source path `ext/node/polyfills/internal/child_process.ts`, neither of which are mentioned in instruction.md; the agent must discover these. Also specific spec test paths like `tests/specs/node/child_process_shell_escape/main.ts` are not named.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes broken behavior and which metacharacters need escaping, but doesn't prescribe the exact code change or regex.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests extract `escapeShellArg` by literal marker `function escapeShellArg(arg: string): string {` in `_build_win_escape_test_script`; any alternative fix that renames or restructures this function (e.g., inline the check elsewhere) would fail even if behaviorally correct.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute Deno scripts that invoke the extracted function and run spec tests as subprocesses.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests assert that specific characters cause the argument to change, and plain args don't change — stub returning input unchanged fails the f2p tests.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all listed metacharacters (&|<>^!()), plain passthrough, and existing escaping behavior.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comment headers (fail-to-pass, pass-to-pass CI, regression) and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task doesn't produce structured data output.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the child_process polyfill layer generally without naming the specific file or line.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not a config edit.
